Hydra Scheduler — Jobs

Hydra Scheduler task definitions specify a shell command, a container image, CPU and memory resource requests, retry policy, exponential backoff, and a priority class. Hydra Scheduler tasks land on a global priority queue; higher-priority tasks preempt lower-priority tasks when worker capacity is constrained. Task fan-out via DAG dependencies lets a Hydra Scheduler task spawn child tasks that depend on parent task exit codes; Hydra Scheduler enforces the topological order at dispatch time.
